```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# WGBS 分析流程 - Step 9: DEG-focused 甲基化分析
# ==============================================================================
# 如果说第 7 节是"甲基化主视角"，这里更像"表达主视角"，专门反过来看 DEGs 的甲基化状态。
# 当前继续保留既有 `pvalue < config$rna_p_threshold` 过滤口径，避免改变当前结果。
# 最终严格解读时建议同步检查 RNA `padj < 0.05`，富集结果优先报告 `p.adjust/qvalue < 0.05`。
message("⏳ 开始 DEGs 的深度甲基化模式分析...")

rna_p_threshold <- config$rna_p_threshold
rna_log2fc_threshold <- config$rna_log2fc_threshold
multiomics_methyl_delta <- config$multiomics_methyl_delta
enrichment_p_threshold <- config$enrichment_p_threshold
enrich_top_n_kegg <- config$enrichment_top_n_kegg
enrich_top_n_go <- config$enrichment_top_n_go
enrich_goplot_top_n <- config$enrichment_goplot_top_n
enrich_cnet_show_category <- config$enrichment_cnet_show_category
enrich_tree_show_category <- config$enrichment_tree_show_category

ensure_step_dirs(
  "result/9_degfocused/plots/1",
  "result/9_degfocused/plots/2_cgi",
  "result/9_degfocused/tables/1"
)

# 重新加载 TxDb 以防止 bad_weak_ptr 错误
txdb <- load_main_chr_txdb(config$gtf_file)

# 让本 step 可以在仅重跑 8-10 时独立恢复 CGI 上下文所需对象。
# 参考文件需提前准备，Rmd 不再在渲染阶段联网下载。
cgi_file <- config$cpg_island_file

# 1 DEGs 区域甲基化水平 (Gene Body & Promoter)
if(exists("expr_df") && "pvalue" %in% colnames(expr_df)) {
  ensure_obj_cpg_loaded()
  # 先限定到显著 DEGs，再分别看 gene body 和 promoter 两层区域，
  # 用来回答"表达变化的基因，是否也伴随局部甲基化模式变化"。
  sig_deg_df <- expr_df %>% filter(pvalue <= rna_p_threshold)
  target_ids <- sig_deg_df$gene_id_clean
  
  if(nrow(sig_deg_df) > 0) {
    all_genes_gr <- genes(txdb)
    all_promoters_gr <- promoters(all_genes_gr, upstream = config$promoter_upstream, downstream = config$promoter_downstream)
    common_ids <- intersect(target_ids, names(all_genes_gr))
    
    if(length(common_ids) > 0) {
      deg_genes_gr <- all_genes_gr[common_ids]
      deg_promoters_gr <- all_promoters_gr[common_ids]
      sig_deg_df <- sig_deg_df %>% filter(gene_id_clean %in% common_ids)
      
      # 分别对 gene body 和 promoter 做区域 x 样本汇总。
      # 这里不再要求所有样本共同覆盖同一区域；描述性热图保留 NA，并把支持度写出。
      build_deg_region_result <- function(region_gr, region_name, support_file) {
        region_meth <- build_region_sample_methylation(
          obj.cpg,
          region_gr,
          sample_ids_arg = sample_ids,
          config_arg = config,
          region_ids = names(region_gr)
        )
        write_csv(region_meth$support, support_file)
        mat <- region_meth$matrix
        if(is.null(mat) || nrow(mat) == 0) {
          return(list(mat = mat, df = data.frame()))
        }
        group1_n <- rowSums(is.finite(mat[, config$group1_idx, drop = FALSE]))
        group2_n <- rowSums(is.finite(mat[, config$group2_idx, drop = FALSE]))
        group1_mean <- rowMeans(mat[, config$group1_idx, drop = FALSE], na.rm = TRUE)
        group2_mean <- rowMeans(mat[, config$group2_idx, drop = FALSE], na.rm = TRUE)
        diff_val <- group2_mean - group1_mean
        diff_val[group1_n == 0 | group2_n == 0] <- NA_real_
        df_res <- data.frame(
          gene_id_clean = rownames(mat),
          Meth_Diff = diff_val,
          Region = region_name,
          n_group1_samples = group1_n,
          n_group2_samples = group2_n
        )
        list(mat = mat, df = df_res)
      }
      
      res_gene <- build_deg_region_result(
        deg_genes_gr,
        "Gene Body",
        "result/9_degfocused/tables/1/deg_gene_body_region_support.csv"
      )
      res_prom <- build_deg_region_result(
        deg_promoters_gr,
        "Promoter",
        "result/9_degfocused/tables/1/deg_promoter_region_support.csv"
      )
      
      # 热图用于看 DEGs 内部是否有相似甲基化轮廓，因此这里固定列顺序、不额外聚类样本列。
      draw_heatmap <- function(mat, title_suffix) {
        if(is.null(mat) || nrow(mat) < 2 || ncol(mat) < 2) return(NULL)
        mat <- as.matrix(mat)
        
        # pheatmap(scale = "row") 对恒定行或包含非有限值的行会产生 NaN，
        # 进而在 hclust() 时报 "NA/NaN/Inf"。这里先手动清洗再做 row z-score。
        keep_rows <- apply(mat, 1, function(x) {
          finite_x <- x[is.finite(x)]
          length(finite_x) >= 2 && stats::sd(finite_x) > 0
        })
        mat <- mat[keep_rows, , drop = FALSE]
        if(nrow(mat) < 2) return(NULL)
        
        mat_scaled <- t(apply(mat, 1, function(x) {
          finite_idx <- is.finite(x)
          mu <- mean(x[finite_idx], na.rm = TRUE)
          sigma <- stats::sd(x[finite_idx], na.rm = TRUE)
          z <- (x - mu) / sigma
          z[!is.finite(z)] <- 0
          z
        }))
        rownames(mat_scaled) <- rownames(mat)
        colnames(mat_scaled) <- colnames(mat)
        
        pheatmap::pheatmap(
          mat_scaled,
          scale = "none",
          show_rownames = FALSE,
          cluster_rows = nrow(mat_scaled) > 1,
          cluster_cols = FALSE,
          main = paste("Methylation Heatmap of DEGs -", title_suffix),
          color = viz_pal$heat_meth,
          filename = paste0("result/9_degfocused/plots/1/heatmap_", gsub(" ", "", title_suffix), ".pdf"),
          width = 6,
          height = 8
        )
      }
      draw_heatmap(res_gene$mat, "Gene Body")
      draw_heatmap(res_prom$mat, "Promoter")
      
      # 再把表达和甲基化拼到一张散点图里，看整体耦合方向是否一致。
      merged_df <- bind_rows(res_gene$df, res_prom$df) %>% inner_join(sig_deg_df, by = "gene_id_clean")
      merged_df$log2FoldChange <- as.numeric(merged_df$log2FoldChange)
      
      p_corr <- ggplot(merged_df, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = Meth_Diff)) +
        geom_point(aes(color = pvalue), alpha = 0.6, size = 1.5) +
        geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = viz_pal$neutral_dark, linetype = "dashed") +
        facet_wrap(~Region, scales = "free_y") +
        scale_color_wgbs_ryb(name = "RNA pvalue") +
        geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
        theme_wgbs_bw(base_size = 14) +
        labs(title = "Correlation: Expression vs Methylation Change (DEGs)", x = "Log2 Fold Change", y = group_diff_axis_label)
      
      ggsave("result/9_degfocused/plots/1/correlation_expr_meth.pdf", p_corr, width = 10, height = 5, device = cairo_pdf)
      write_csv(merged_df, "result/9_degfocused/tables/1/degs_meth_expr_integrated.csv")
    }
  }
}

# 2 CGI 与 RNA-seq 联合分析 (DEGs in CGI Context)
if (exists("expr_df") && exists("txdb")) {
  methyl_group_cols <- c(config$group1_name, config$group2_name)
  # 复用 6.2 里构建的 CGI 上下游区域列表；如果 6.2 未运行，则这里直接报错提示。
  if (!exists("meth_gr_mean")) {
     ensure_obj_cpg_loaded()
     message("   正在从原始 CpG 记录重新计算 meth_gr_mean...")
     # meth_gr_mean 保存的是每个 CpG 的组均值，后面会和 CGI 区域做 overlap 汇总。
     meth_gr_mean <- build_group_mean_methyl_gr(obj.cpg, sample_ids, config)
  }

  cgi_resources <- get_cgi_context_resources(config, target_gr = meth_gr_mean, required = FALSE)

  if(!is.null(cgi_resources)) {
    region_list <- cgi_resources$region_list_cgi
    gr_all_cgi_context <- cgi_resources$gr_all_cgi_context

    # 计算每个 CGI 区域的甲基化差异
    message("   正在计算 CGI 区域甲基化差异...")
    region_list_meth <- list()
    for(reg_name in names(region_list)) {
      # 对每类 CGI 区域单独聚合覆盖到的 CpG，得到区域级 group2 - group1 甲基化差异。
      gr <- region_list[[reg_name]]
      ov <- findOverlaps(gr, meth_gr_mean, ignore.strand = TRUE)
      
      if(length(ov) > 0) {
        meth_vals <- data.frame(
            idx = queryHits(ov),
            group1 = mcols(meth_gr_mean)[[methyl_group_cols[[1]]]][subjectHits(ov)],
            group2 = mcols(meth_gr_mean)[[methyl_group_cols[[2]]]][subjectHits(ov)]
        )
        
        meth_agg <- meth_vals %>%
            group_by(idx) %>%
            summarise(
                mean_group1 = mean(group1, na.rm=TRUE),
                mean_group2 = mean(group2, na.rm=TRUE),
                .groups = 'drop'
            )
        
        gr$diffMethy <- NA
        # 转换为 0-1 范围 (percMethylation 是 0-100)
        gr$diffMethy[meth_agg$idx] <- (meth_agg$mean_group2 - meth_agg$mean_group1) / 100
      } else {
        gr$diffMethy <- NA
      }
      region_list_meth[[reg_name]] <- gr
    }

    deg_df <- expr_df %>% filter(pvalue <= rna_p_threshold)
  
    if (nrow(deg_df) > 0) {
    all_genes_gr <- genes(txdb)
    deg_ids <- deg_df$gene_id_clean[deg_df$gene_id_clean %in% names(all_genes_gr)]
    deg_gr <- all_genes_gr[deg_ids]
    
    deg_cgi_df <- data.frame()
    for (reg_name in names(region_list_meth)) {
      # 这里把显著 DEG 映射到不同 CGI context，形成后续箱线图/散点图/富集的基础表。
      gr <- region_list_meth[[reg_name]]
      ov <- findOverlaps(deg_gr, gr)
      
      if (length(ov) > 0) {
        tmp_ids <- names(deg_gr)[queryHits(ov)]
        tmp_diff <- gr$diffMethy[subjectHits(ov)]
        
        tmp_df <- data.frame(
            gene_id_clean = tmp_ids,
            diffMethy = tmp_diff,
            CGI_Context = reg_name
        )
        # Join with deg_df to get log2FoldChange
        tmp_df <- inner_join(tmp_df, deg_df, by="gene_id_clean")
        
        deg_cgi_df <- bind_rows(deg_cgi_df, tmp_df)
      }
    }
    
    # 移除无甲基化数据的行
    deg_cgi_df <- deg_cgi_df %>% filter(!is.na(diffMethy))
    
    write_csv(deg_cgi_df, "result/9_degfocused/tables/1/degs_in_cgi_context.csv")
    
    if (nrow(deg_cgi_df) > 0) {
      # 1. 箱线图：比较不同 CGI context 中 DEG 的表达分布。
      p_deg_cgi <- ggplot(deg_cgi_df, aes(x = CGI_Context, y = log2FoldChange, fill = CGI_Context)) +
        geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.color = viz_pal$dmr["Hyper"], outlier.shape = NA) +
        geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8) +
        scale_fill_manual(values = viz_pal$cgi[c("Island", "N_Shore", "S_Shore", "N_Shelf", "S_Shelf")]) +
        theme_wgbs_classic(base_size = 14) +
        labs(title = "Expression Changes of DEGs in CGI Context", x = "CGI Context", y = "Log2 Fold Change")
      
      ggsave("result/9_degfocused/plots/1/degs_in_cgi_boxplot.pdf", p_deg_cgi, width = 7, height = 5, device = cairo_pdf)
      
      # 2. 散点图：只有表达和甲基化都达到较明显阈值时，才按 CGI context 着色。
      deg_cgi_df <- deg_cgi_df %>%
          mutate(Status = case_when(
              abs(diffMethy) > multiomics_methyl_delta & abs(log2FoldChange) > rna_log2fc_threshold ~ CGI_Context,
              TRUE ~ "NS"
          ))
      
      p_scatter_cgi <- ggplot(deg_cgi_df, aes(x = diffMethy, y = log2FoldChange)) +
          geom_point(aes(color = Status), size = 1, alpha = 0.6) +
          scale_color_manual(values = viz_pal$cgi[c("Island", "N_Shore", "S_Shore", "N_Shelf", "S_Shelf", "NS")]) +
          geom_hline(yintercept = c(-rna_log2fc_threshold, rna_log2fc_threshold), linetype = "dashed") +
          geom_vline(xintercept = c(-multiomics_methyl_delta, multiomics_methyl_delta), linetype = "dashed") +
          theme_wgbs_classic(base_size = 13) +
          labs(title = "DEGs Methylation vs Expression in CGI Contexts", x = "Methylation Difference", y = "Log2 Fold Change")
          
      ggsave("result/9_degfocused/plots/1/degs_cgi_scatter.pdf", p_scatter_cgi, width = 8, height = 6, device = cairo_pdf)
    }
  }
  } else {
    write_csv(
      tibble(step = "cgi_reference", status = "skipped", message = "CpG Island reference file is missing"),
      "result/9_degfocused/tables/1/cgi_reference_status.csv"
    )
  }
}

# 3 CGI 区域 DEGs GO/KEGG 富集分析
if (exists("deg_cgi_df") && nrow(deg_cgi_df) > 0) {
  all_go_results <- list()
  all_kegg_results <- list()
  cgi_context_levels <- c("Island", "N_Shore", "S_Shore", "N_Shelf", "S_Shelf")

  # 这里同时要求 RNA 和甲基化都有较明显变化，尽量聚焦真正耦合的候选基因。
  for(reg in cgi_context_levels) {
    if(!(reg %in% unique(deg_cgi_df$CGI_Context))) next
    message("   👉 正在分析 CGI 区域: ", reg)
    reg_dir <- file.path("result/9_degfocused/plots/2_cgi", reg)
    sub_deg_df <- deg_cgi_df %>%
      filter(
        CGI_Context == reg,
        pvalue < rna_p_threshold,
        abs(log2FoldChange) > rna_log2fc_threshold,
        abs(diffMethy) > multiomics_methyl_delta
      )

    if(nrow(sub_deg_df) == 0) {
      write_csv(
        tibble(CGI_Context = reg, status = "skipped", message = "no genes passed RNA and methylation filters"),
        file.path("result/9_degfocused/tables/1", paste0("cgi_enrichment_status_", reg, ".csv"))
      )
      next
    }

    enrich_res <- run_ora_enrichment_bundle(
      input_df = sub_deg_df,
      context_name = reg,
      plot_dir = reg_dir,
      table_dir = "result/9_degfocused/tables/1",
      file_prefix = "",
      context_col = "CGI_Context",
      p_threshold = enrichment_p_threshold
    )

    if(!is.null(enrich_res$go_bp)) {
      all_go_results[[reg]] <- append_context_column(as.data.frame(enrich_res$go_bp), "CGI_Context", reg)
    }
    if(!is.null(enrich_res$kegg)) {
      all_kegg_results[[reg]] <- append_context_column(as.data.frame(enrich_res$kegg), "CGI_Context", reg)
    }
  }

  # 合并热图
  if (length(all_go_results) > 0) {
    go_combined <- bind_rows(all_go_results)
    write_csv(go_combined, "result/9_degfocused/tables/1/go_cgi_combined.csv")

    # GO term 往往很多，这里只保留显著性最高的一批条目，保证热图可读。
    save_enrichment_compare_heatmap(
      df = go_combined,
      context_col = "CGI_Context",
      out_pdf = "result/9_degfocused/plots/1/go_cgi_heatmap.pdf",
      out_csv = "result/9_degfocused/tables/1/go_cgi_heatmap_long.csv",
      title = "GO Enrichment (pvalue-filtered, -log10 p.adjust) across CGI Context",
      top_n = 40,
      width = 12,
      height = 10,
      value_col = "p.adjust"
    )
  }
  
  # KEGG 合并分析 (如果有多个区域)
  if (length(all_kegg_results) > 0) {
    kegg_combined <- bind_rows(all_kegg_results)
    write_csv(kegg_combined, "result/9_degfocused/tables/1/kegg_cgi_combined.csv")

    save_enrichment_compare_heatmap(
      df = kegg_combined,
      context_col = "CGI_Context",
      out_pdf = "result/9_degfocused/plots/1/kegg_cgi_heatmap.pdf",
      out_csv = "result/9_degfocused/tables/1/kegg_cgi_heatmap_long.csv",
      title = "KEGG Enrichment (pvalue-filtered, -log10 p.adjust) across CGI Context",
      top_n = 30,
      width = 10,
      height = 8,
      value_col = "p.adjust"
    )
  }
}
```
